Rules.InvariantScript: "Brief description of what happened and what assistance is needed"

[
    "Low – Minor issue",
    "Medium – Needs attention",
    "High – Urgent",
    "Critical – Immediate response"
]
"You can assign volunteers and update the status after creation. Critical incidents will be prioritized in the system."

If(
    IsBlank(Title.Text) ||
    IsBlank(Description.Text) ||
    IsBlank(Severity.Selected.Value) ||
    IsBlank(Beach_Zone.Selected.Value) ||
    IsBlank(Specific_location.Text) ||
    IsBlank(Reportee.Text),

    Set(showIncidentErrors, true);
    Notify("Please fill in all required fields.", NotificationType.Error),

    Patch(
        Incidents,
        Defaults(Incidents),
        {
            IncidentTitle: Title.Text,
            Description: Description.Text,
            EmergencyLevel: {
                Value: If(
                    Severity.Selected.Value = "Low – Minor issue",
                    "low",
                    Severity.Selected.Value = "Medium – Needs attention",
                    "medium",
                    Severity.Selected.Value = "High – Urgent",
                    "high",
                    Severity.Selected.Value = "Critical – Immediate response",
                    "critical"
                )
            },
            BeachSection: {Value: Beach_Zone.Selected.Value},
            Location: Specific_location.Text,
            Status: {Value: "pending"},
            ReportedBy: Reportee.Text,
            ReportedAt: Now()
        }
    );

    Refresh(Incidents);
    Set(showIncidentErrors, false);
    Notify("Incident logged successfully.", NotificationType.Success);

    Switch(
        currentRole,

        "Volunteer",
            Navigate(VolunteerLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

        "Patrol Captain",
            Navigate(PatrolCaptainLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade),

        "Club Admin",
            Navigate(ClubAdminLandingPage, ScreenTransition.Fade)
    )
)
